demographics.living_situation: lives alone; has been too exhausted lately to keep on top of things at home

opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My urine is entirely dark red with heavy clots, I have a constant heavy ache in my side, and I have lost so much weight I barely recognize myself.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: Tonight the blood got much worse and I'm passing big thick clots that really hurt to pass, and I'm scared and worn out.

symptom_narrative.onset: the side ache and dark urine have been building for weeks, but tonight the bleeding and clots suddenly got much worse
symptom_narrative.duration: a dull ache and blood in the urine on and off for a while; the heavy clots started this evening
symptom_narrative.character: urine is dark red with big thick clots; the side pain is a dull, constant heavy ache rather than a sharp cramp
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: passing the clots is really painful and I feel completely wiped out and weak
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: right side and lower back, deep and heavy
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: the ache is there all the time; the heavy clots came on tonight
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: nothing really helps; I've just been resting in the recliner
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: passing the big clots is the worst part
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: I've lost about twelve kilos in three months without trying, I get drenching night sweats, I've felt hot and off for the past week, and I'm exhausted all the time
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: I've noticed a bit of pink in my urine before but never heavy blood and clots like tonight
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I'm too weak and tired to do much; I've been stuck resting in the recliner

social_history_volunteered.smoking_status: heavy smoker for decades — roughly a pack a day for around thirty years
social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives alone; been too fatigued to look after himself or the house properly lately

objective_data_offered.value: urine is entirely dark red with big thick blood clots in it
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: patient's own visual description of urine colour and clots; not laboratory-confirmed

objective_data_offered.value: down to about 75 kg, having lost roughly 12 kg over the past 3 months
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: self-reported from home scales; baseline weight approximate

objective_data_offered.value: drenching night sweats and feeling feverish and hot for the past week, with constant exhaustion
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: subjective; no home thermometer reading provided

objective_data_offered.value: looks pale, gaunt and visibly worn out on camera
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: impression over video, not a clinical examination
